children.text: The following is a transcription of the Herbert Huncke set at Ultimatum, Sunday, May 5th, 1985 at the Foufounes Electriques. Huncke was an American writer and poet and member of the Beat Generation, a term which he is considered to have coined. He is the author of the book The Evening Sun Turned Crimson from which he reads three stories in his Ultimatum set: "Cuba", "Alvarez", and "Russian Blackie".
